task_completion.description: Navigate to nhtsa.gov to search for vehicle safety and recall data.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and displaying the nhtsa.gov website, specifically pages related to vehicle safety ratings or recalls.

task_completion.description: Create the fleet_safety_report.txt file on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'fleet_safety_report.txt' is visible on the Desktop, or a text editor is open displaying this file path.

task_completion.description: Record the correct safety rating and recall count for the 2023 Toyota Camry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fleet_safety_report.txt file contains an entry for the 2023 Toyota Camry showing a 5-Star Overall Safety Rating and 2 recalls.

task_completion.description: Record the correct safety rating and recall count for the 2023 Ford F-150.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fleet_safety_report.txt file contains an entry for the 2023 Ford F-150 showing a 5-Star Overall Safety Rating and 7 recalls.

task_completion.description: Record the correct safety rating and recall count for the 2023 Jeep Wrangler.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fleet_safety_report.txt file contains an entry for the 2023 Jeep Wrangler showing a 4-Star Overall Safety Rating and 12 recalls.

task_completion.description: Download an Electronic Stability Control document to the Downloads folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal shows a document (likely a PDF) related to 'Electronic Stability Control' or 'ESC' located in the /home/ga/Downloads/ directory.

integrity.description: The agent actually used a web browser to look up the information on NHTSA.gov.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with nhtsa.gov, rather than the agent hallucinating the data directly into a text file.

integrity.description: The report file is saved in the correct Desktop directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor or file explorer confirms the file path is /home/ga/Desktop/fleet_safety_report.txt.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a pre-written script containing the answers to bypass the research phase.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no python or bash scripts visible that contain the hardcoded strings '5-Star', '4-Star', '2 recalls', '7 recalls', or '12 recalls'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: 2023 Toyota Camry (4-Door Sedan): 5-Star Overall Safety Rating, 2 recalls. 2023 Ford F-150 (Super Crew): 5-Star Overall Safety Rating, 7 recalls. 2023 Jeep Wrangler (4-Door Unlimited): 4-Star Overall Safety Rating, 12 recalls. Note: There is no specific 'Electronic Stability Control' technical report for the 2023 Camry on NHTSA.gov, so the agent may download a generic ESC standard/research document or fail to find the exact specific file, but should attempt the download to the Downloads folder.
